title: potentilla alpestris var. debilis
intro: Potentilla alpestris var. debilis is a variant of the alpine cinquefoil plant, a species of flowering plant in the rose family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Potentilla alpestris var. debilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
